message:
Major core crate expansion: async runtime abstraction, host discovery, and 4000+ lines of tests

Sweeping improvements across 15+ FCP2 core crates:

fcp-async-core (runtime abstraction):
  - Replace tokio::main/tokio::test re-exports with custom procedural
    macros from new fcp-async-core-macros crate, enabling runtime-
    agnostic test execution across the connector ecosystem
  - Add extern crate self alias for macro hygiene
  - Migrate time module from tokio::time to asupersync::time with
    wall_now() epoch tracking and Time↔Instant bridging
  - Add OnceLock-based TIMER_EPOCH for monotonic-to-wall-clock mapping

fcp-host (discovery + budget + doctor):
  - fcp-host.rs: +525 lines — add /rpc/discover, /rpc/introspect,
    /rpc/preflight, /rpc/health endpoints; AppState refactor with
    Arc-wrapped registry, doctor, discovery, and uptime tracking
  - budget.rs: +342 lines of MetricWindow edge-case tests (roll
    boundary, window resize, zero-window, multi-window skip)
  - discovery.rs: +445 lines of discovery endpoint tests (filter by
    archetype, capability, status; pagination; empty results)
  - doctor.rs: +264 lines of expanded doctor service tests
  - Integration tests: +244 lines for discovery and preflight flows

fcp-cbor: +403 lines of boundary tests for split_schema_prefix,
  canonicalize_value_in_place (Tag recursion, nested maps, arrays)

fcp-manifest: +813 lines of manifest validation and serde tests

fcp-protocol:
  - fcps.rs: +250 lines of FCPS frame encoding/decoding tests
  - session.rs: +538 lines of SessionCryptoSuite serde, SessionNonce
    randomness, MeshSessionId, handshake state machine tests

fcp-registry: +627 lines of expanded serde roundtrip and coverage tests

fcp-sandbox/egress.rs: +317 lines of egress filter tests

fcp-raptorq: Decoder/encoder improvements with additional error paths

fcp-graphql/pagination.rs: Pagination edge-case fixes

fcp-sdk/migration.rs: Minor migration helper adjustment

Dependency cleanup:
  - Remove redundant tokio dev-dependency from bootstrap, cli,
    conformance, e2e, graphql, mesh, ratelimit, streaming, tailscale,
    telemetry Cargo.toml files (now inherited via fcp-async-core)
  - Add fcp-async-core-macros dependency to fcp-async-core

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
